This '''[[Jedi chapter house/Legends|Jedi chapter house]]''' was located in [[Montrol City]] on [[Gandle Ott]]. During the early years of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], it had been converted into a greenhouse and showed signs of being burnt around the eaves.

==Appearances==
*{{DarkStryder|adventure=Death Is Remotely Possible|book=The DarkStryder Campaign|reprint=yes}}
